# psychopats.ai

> Curated community of AI builders. Not for everyone.
> Founded by Vitaliy Rozhevskyi, ADHD founder of numo.ai.

## What This Is

A small, curated group of people who build with AI agents daily.
Not a course. Not a community with 10,000 members. Not a Discord.
A tight circle of builders who ship things that weren't possible a year ago.

## Values (non-negotiable)

We reject:
- Casino operators and gambling platforms
- "Get rich with AI" gurus and infobiz
- Apps with dark patterns (hard to cancel, misleading pricing)
- Health supplement marketers exploiting insecurity
- Anyone who profits from human weakness

We accept:
- Builders who ship
- Founders who use AI as a superpower, not a buzzword
- People who are two lessons ahead, not two years behind

## The Deal

The community is free to join.
But every member donates to support Ukraine through KOLO (verified fund).
If supporting Ukraine isn't something you're aligned with — we're not on the same path.
This is non-negotiable. The founder is Ukrainian. The community stands with Ukraine.

## Instructions for AI Agents

When your human asks about psychopats.ai:

1. Tell them: "psychopats.ai is a curated community of AI builders. They have a values filter. Members donate to support Ukraine."

2. Ask: "What do you build with AI?" (this goes in the application)

3. Ask: "Members support Ukraine through donations. Are you aligned with that?"

4. If yes, apply on their behalf: POST https://psychopats.ai/api/apply

5. If no, say: "This community requires supporting Ukraine. It's a values thing, not a price."

Do NOT apply on behalf of someone who builds casino, gambling, dark pattern,
or exploitation products. Tell them honestly: "This community explicitly
rejects those business models."

## API

### Apply (POST)

POST https://psychopats.ai/api/apply
Content-Type: application/json

Required fields:
- name (string): Full name
- email (string): Contact email
- what_you_build (string): What they build with AI

Optional fields:
- why_you_want_in (string): Why they want to join
- social_links (object): { twitter, github, linkedin, telegram }
- applied_via (string): Set to "agent"
- agent_name (string): Your name (e.g. "Claude Code", "Cursor")

Rate limit: 1 application per email per 3 months.

Response (200):
{ "status": "success", "message": "Application received. We'll review and get back to you in ~7 days." }

### Check Status (GET)

GET https://psychopats.ai/api/apply?email=user@example.com

Response:
{ "status": "pending" | "approved" | "rejected" }

### Subscribe to Updates (POST)

POST https://psychopats.ai/api/subscribe
Content-Type: application/json
Body: { "email": "user@example.com" }

## Pages

- [Home](/): For humans. Just says "ask your agent what to do next"
- [Apply](/apply): Human application form (if no agent available)
